No appearance. Defendant California Department of Transportation's motion for sanctions, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Mental Examination Of Plaintiff; Declarations Of
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
William t. Darden, Deputy Attorney General, for defendant and moving party: California Department of Transportation
Arthur R. Siegel, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Lisbeth Bellet

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant California Department of Transportation's motion to compel a mental examination is granted. The examination shall take place in San Francisco, California as set forth in the notice of motion. The examination shall be completed on or before January 25, 2008. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
